title: SCOS Stage Certification Manifest
description: Machine-readable manifest emitted by each SCOS stage certification. One instance per stage (e.g. docs/certification/Stage-3.8.json). Consumed by dashboards, CLI, and release tooling without parsing the human Markdown report.

tag.description: Annotated git tag on the implementation commit, e.g. "scos-stage-3.8-certified".

implementation_commit.description: Short or full SHA of the implementation commit the tag points at.

documentation_commit.description: SHA of the certification-docs commit. Null when the manifest is committed inside that same commit (a file cannot contain its own commit hash); the value is then recoverable from git log.

regression_total.description: Total passing tests across all suites at certification time.

regression_baseline.description: Certified baseline that regression_total must meet or exceed.

technical_debt.description: Count of recorded (non-blocking) technical-debt backlog items.

blocking.description: True if any blocking issue remains (must be false for a PASS closure).

next_stage.description: Next planned stage (not started under this certification).
